item.title: Version 1.8.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.8.0

Parent Questionnaire System

  • Institutional Feedback: Launched a dedicated module for capturing parent feedback on school performance and student well-being.
  • Weighted Point System: Implemented a specialized scoring logic ranging from +2 (Strongly Agree) to -2 (Strongly Disagree).
  • Grouped Feedback Domains: Organized 18 parent questions into three pedagogical categories: Student Wellbeing, Teaching & Information, and School Leadership.
  • Student-Centric Context: Replaced teacher-dependency with Student/Classroom context for broader institutional evaluation.

School Satisfaction Analytics

  • Satisfaction Index: Added a real-time "School Satisfaction Index" that aggregates parent sentiment into a percentage-based performance metric.
  • Improvement Area Tracking: New analytics card that automatically identifies the lowest-performing feedback category for management focus.
  • Neutrality Rate: Implemented tracking for "No Answer" responses to measure parent engagement and information transparency.
  • Satisfaction Trends: Integrated time-series charts to monitor how parent perception changes across academic terms.

Performance Standards

  • Parent Context: Added "Parent" as a first-class citizen in the Performance Standards system.
  • Customizable Thresholds: Management can now manually define percentage boundaries for High Satisfaction, Good Feedback, Mixed Feedback, and Low Satisfaction.

Reporting & History

  • Formatted Reports: Integrated ReportGenerator for Parent Questionnaires, allowing professional, structured text sharing via clipboard.
  • High-Contrast Remarks: Refactored Consolidated Remark sheets with filled, color-coded badges for maximum readability and accessibility.
  • History Details: Comprehensive history tracking with student-specific feedback logs and point-to-percentage mapping.
  • Advanced Filtering: Added granular filters to History and Analytics to view feedback by Classroom, Specific Student, or Satisfaction score.

Bug Fixes & UI Polishing

  • Persistence Fix: Resolved an issue where parent remarks would disappear when scrolling due to ListView recycling.
  • Date Logic: Implemented "Scope Aware" setup that defaults the review date to the currently selected Academic Period.
  • Editor Crash: Fixed a critical "Red Screen" crash when opening standards in the Parent context.
  • Chart Precision: Fixed a bug showing long decimal numbers on satisfaction trend tooltips.
  • UI Kit Update: Enhanced TigleDropdown with enabled state support for better cascading filter UX.

Configuration

  • Version Bump: Updated to version 1.8.0.
  • Database Schema: Added ParentQuestionnaireEntry collection to the Isar database.
